name: Blueberry Brunch Cake
recipeInstructions: Cream butter and sugar; add eggs and lemon peel. Combine dry ingredients and add to creamed mixture with sour cream. Spread batter in a greased 9-inch springform pan, spreading batter one inch up the sides of the pan to hold the filling. Combine filling ingredients and spread over batter. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes. Combine glaze ingredients and drizzle over cake.
